name: setup-neon-auth
description: Guide the user through setting up Neon Auth in a Vite+React project, covering provisioning, package installation, client setup, and UI components.

arguments.name: projectId
arguments.description: Optional Neon project ID. If not provided, the guide will help discover available projects.

arguments.name: branchId
arguments.description: Optional branch ID. If not provided, the default branch will be used.

arguments.name: databaseName
arguments.description: Optional database name. If not provided, the default database (neondb) will be used.
